_comment: Imperial Codex MCP Server Configuration — Extended with awesome MCP servers and dual-mode agentic models (Qwen/Phi4)
_docs: See docs/deployment.md for full setup instructions and docs/mcp-servers.md for MCP server guide.

imperial-codex-stdio._comment: Local stdio transport — run the MCP server as a child process. Best for Claude Desktop and Cursor.
imperial-codex-stdio.description: Imperial Codex MCP server (local stdio) — 13 tools for Pillars, OS Modules, Library, Strike Output, and more

imperial-codex-http._comment: Remote HTTP transport — connect to the deployed Vercel instance. Requires authentication.
imperial-codex-http.description: Imperial Codex MCP server (remote HTTP) — requires valid imperial-session cookie

filesystem._comment: Official MCP server for secure file operations with configurable access controls
filesystem.description: Secure file operations with configurable access controls

memory._comment: Official MCP server for knowledge graph-based persistent memory system

git._comment: Official MCP server for Git repository operations
git.description: Tools to read, search, and manipulate Git repositories

fetch._comment: Official MCP server for web content fetching and conversion
fetch.description: Web content fetching and conversion for efficient LLM usage

sequentialthinking._comment: Official MCP server for dynamic and reflective problem-solving through thought sequences
sequentialthinking.description: Dynamic and reflective problem-solving through thought sequences

time._comment: Official MCP server for time and timezone conversion capabilities

everything._comment: Official MCP reference server demonstrating prompts, resources, and tools
everything.description: Reference server with prompts, resources, and tools demonstrations

brave-search._comment: Brave Search MCP server for web and local search
brave-search.description: Web and local search using Brave's Search API

github._comment: Community MCP server for GitHub API integration
github.description: Repository management, file operations, and GitHub API integration

slack._comment: Community MCP server for Slack integration
slack.description: Slack channel management and messaging capabilities

postgres._comment: MCP server for PostgreSQL database access with schema inspection
postgres.description: Read-only database access with schema inspection and querying

sqlite._comment: MCP server for SQLite database interaction
sqlite.description: Database interaction and business intelligence capabilities

redis._comment: MCP server for Redis key-value store interaction

puppeteer._comment: MCP server for browser automation and web scraping
puppeteer.description: Browser automation and web scraping capabilities

agentic_modes._comment: Dual-mode agentic configuration for Qwen and Phi4 models

completion.description: Standard completion mode for text generation

agentic.description: Agentic mode with tool use and multi-step reasoning

completion.description: Standard completion mode for text generation

agentic.description: Agentic mode with structured reasoning and tool orchestration

agent_orchestration._comment: Orchestration strategy for multi-model agentic tasks
